title: polypodium triseriale var. gladiatum
intro: Polypodium triseriale var. gladiatum, also known as the Polypodium leucotomos var. gladiatum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly referred to as the 'Resurrection Fern' due to its unique ability to revive itself after drying out. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Polypodium triseriale var. gladiatum include protecting the skin from sun damage, reducing the risk of skin cancer, and promoting overall skin health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often extracted into a topical cream or oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be easily absorbed by the skin.
